_instructions: Copy the 'mcpServers' block below into your Claude Desktop config file.
The vibeos-mcp binary is built at: out/main/vibeos-mcp.js (run via node).
The VIBEOS_MCP_TOKEN is auto-generated by the daemon on startup and written to:
The shim reads the token file automatically. Set VIBEOS_MCP_TOKEN in the env
below to the value from mcp-token.json (or let the onboarding UI handle it).
Full UI-based 'Connect Claude' onboarding lands in Cycle 26.
